search_query: why are vaccine administration fees different
combined_text: Doctors charge differently for the same vaccine - what's the deal? "Doctors charge differently for the same vaccine - what's the deal? LISA PRIESTPublished February 26, 2012Updated March 26, 2017The Question I recently went to my physician to have the Twinrix vaccine – used to help prevent hepatitis A and B – administered. He told me it would cost $25 for each time
